title: AI Search Readiness Audit & Fix Plan
use_case: Build an agentic workflow that ingests your homepage HTML, scores AI-search readiness on a 100-point rubric, classifies your site Hot/Warm/Cold for answer-engine citation, and drafts the exact fixes — JSON-LD blocks, rewritten paragraphs, robots.txt additions — ready to paste in.

title: Diagnose Why AI Engines Aren't Citing You
use_case: You're ranking on Google but ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews never mention you. This agentic workflow walks the four-layer diagnostic — crawl access, schema coverage, content extractability, and entity authority — and tells you which layer is the bottleneck plus the next 3 actions to unblock it. Designed for businesses that already have basic SEO in place.

title: Find Duplicate Schema Errors Killing Rich Results
use_case: Scan a page for the #1 cause of Rich Results validation failures: the same data expressed in BOTH visible microdata (itemscope/itemtype/itemprop) AND JSON-LD. Returns a clear list of which microdata attributes to remove from the visible HTML so JSON-LD can stand alone — plus a check for orphaned aggregateRating, broken @id references, and 5 other common Rich Results killers.

title: Find the Sentence AI Engines Will Quote From Your Page
use_case: Identify the single sentence on any page most likely to be lifted as a featured snippet or pulled into an AI Overview citation — or, if no sentence qualifies, write the one you should add and tell you exactly where it belongs.

title: Generate FAQs Your Customers Actually Search For
use_case: Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs phrased the way real customers type into ChatGPT, Google and voice search — not the way your marketing team would write them. Output is ready to drop into FAQPage JSON-LD and your visible FAQ section.

title: Rewrite Your Homepage Hero for AI Answer Engines
use_case: Restructure your homepage's first 50 words so AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) can lift a clean, citation-ready answer to the question your customers actually type. Outputs three voiced versions plus reasoning so you can pick the one that matches your brand.

title: See Which Competitors AI Engines Cite Instead of You
use_case: Run a structured query set across ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude to discover which 3–5 competitors are getting cited for the queries you want to own — and what specifically those competitors are doing on their pages that you're not. Outputs a competitor-by-citation-pattern matrix plus a prioritized gap list.

title: Write a How-To Guide AI Engines Will Cite
use_case: Generate a complete how-to / tutorial article structured exactly the way Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity reward — answer-first intro, numbered atomic steps with image cues, prerequisites, time estimate, and a paste-ready HowTo JSON-LD block. Optimized for citation, not just ranking.

title: 13-Week Cash Flow Forecast Builder
use_case: Generate a week-by-week 13-week cash flow forecast template from your current bank balance, expected receivables, and fixed/variable expenses.

title: 90-Day Onboarding Program Builder
use_case: Create a structured 90-day onboarding plan broken into Week 1 (orientation), Weeks 2-4 (role ramp), and Months 2-3 (independence milestones) with check-in schedules, training resources, and manager talking points.

title: Abandoned Cart Email Recovery Sequence
use_case: Generate a 3-email abandoned cart recovery sequence with escalating urgency — a gentle reminder, a value reinforcement with social proof, and a final offer with scarcity. Each email includes subject line, preview text, body copy, and CTA.

title: AI Implementation Roadmap
use_case: Create a phased 90-day plan for adopting AI across your business — identifying quick wins, building team capability, and scaling what works. Includes budget allocation, success metrics, training milestones, and risk mitigation for each phase.

title: AI Tool Evaluation Scorecard
use_case: Systematically compare 2-4 AI tools for a specific business need — weighted scoring across cost, capability, ease of use, integration, and risk. Eliminates gut-feel tool decisions and produces a defensible recommendation.

title: AI-Powered Lead Qualification & Scoring
use_case: Build an agentic workflow that ingests inbound leads from a CRM export, scores them against your ICP, drafts personalized outreach sequences, and flags high-priority leads for immediate follow-up.

title: Amazon & Etsy Listing Optimizer
use_case: Optimize an existing marketplace listing for higher search ranking and conversion — including title keyword stacking, bullet point restructuring, backend search terms, and A+ content suggestions for Amazon or SEO tags for Etsy.

title: Blog Post Writer & Optimizer
use_case: Write a complete, SEO-optimized blog post from a topic and target keyword — outline, full draft, meta tags, internal link suggestions, and a distribution plan. Produces publish-ready content, not a rough draft that needs heavy editing.

title: Brand Identity System Builder
use_case: Build a complete brand identity system from scratch — color palette with accessibility ratios, typography scale, voice and tone guidelines, visual style rules, and a one-page brand cheat sheet your team can actually use.

title: Brand Voice Style Guide Generator
use_case: Create a comprehensive brand voice guide from examples of your existing content — tone descriptors, vocabulary rules, do/don't examples, and platform-specific adaptations. Ensures every piece of content sounds like it came from the same person, whether you write it or AI does.

title: Case Study & Testimonial Writer
use_case: Transform raw client results and feedback into polished case studies and testimonials — structured for your website, sales decks, and social proof. Follows the problem-solution-result framework with quotable highlights and data callouts.

title: CMO Page Engagement Analyzer
use_case: Analyze any web page through a CMO lens — messaging clarity, positioning strength, engagement hooks, content hierarchy, tagline effectiveness, and audience-market fit. Goes beyond design and CRO to evaluate whether the page tells the right story to the right people with the right energy. Outputs a rewritten messaging framework and engagement optimization plan.

title: Cold Outreach Email Sequence
use_case: Write a complete cold outreach sequence — initial email plus 3 follow-ups — personalized to your target buyer. Includes subject lines, body copy, CTAs, and timing between sends. Designed for B2B service businesses, agencies, and consultants.

title: Competitor Deep Dive Analysis
use_case: Conduct a thorough competitor analysis — positioning, pricing, strengths, weaknesses, customer sentiment, and strategic gaps you can exploit. Outputs an actionable report, not just a feature comparison matrix.

title: Conversion Rate Audit & Fix Plan
use_case: Audit your website or landing page for conversion killers — friction points, unclear messaging, weak CTAs, trust gaps, and mobile issues. Outputs a prioritized fix list with expected impact and implementation difficulty.

title: Convert Your Existing FAQ to FAQPage JSON-LD
use_case: Paste your existing FAQ (any format — headings, bullet list, table, screenshot) and get back a fully valid Schema.org FAQPage JSON-LD block, plus rewritten visible answers tightened for AI citation. Includes a duplicate-data warning so you don't trigger Rich Results errors.

title: Custom AI Agent Design Brief
use_case: Spec out a custom AI assistant or GPT tailored to your specific business function — system prompt, knowledge base requirements, tool integrations, guardrails, and testing plan. Produces a build-ready specification you can hand to a developer or implement yourself.

title: Customer Case Study Writer
use_case: Generate a complete customer case study from raw interview notes or survey responses — including the narrative arc, pull quotes, data callouts, visual layout suggestions, and versions optimized for website, PDF, and sales deck formats.

title: Customer Churn Early Warning System
use_case: Analyze your customer data to identify churn risk patterns, build an early warning checklist, and create targeted save campaigns for at-risk accounts. Works with CRM exports, payment data, or even a spreadsheet of customer activity.

title: Customer Email Response Templates
use_case: Generate a library of reusable email templates for your most common customer interactions — order confirmations, refund requests, complaint responses, feature requests, and more. Each template includes merge fields, tone variations, and escalation paths.

title: Customer Persona Builder
use_case: Build detailed customer personas from your existing data — purchase history, support conversations, survey responses, or even just your experience. Outputs research-backed profiles with demographics, motivations, objections, buying triggers, and content preferences.

title: Customer Review System That Generates Valid Review Schema
use_case: Build a customer review collection workflow whose output maps cleanly to Schema.org Review and AggregateRating — the structured data Google needs to show star ratings in search and AI answer engines need to cite you confidently. Includes review-request email templates, structured intake form fields, and the JSON-LD generator that turns raw reviews into valid markup.

title: Decision-Making Framework
use_case: Work through any tough business decision systematically — from hiring and pricing to partnerships and pivots. Evaluates options across multiple criteria, surfaces hidden risks, stress-tests your assumptions, and produces a clear recommendation with a pre-mortem.

title: Design Critique Partner
use_case: Get a professional design critique on any visual asset — website, logo, pitch deck, social graphics, packaging, or email template. Evaluates hierarchy, typography, color usage, spacing, brand consistency, and user experience. Outputs a prioritized fix list, not just opinions.

title: Dynamic Pricing Strategy Modeler
use_case: Build a pricing analysis workflow that ingests your product catalog, cost structure, competitor pricing, and demand elasticity estimates to recommend optimal price points, bundling strategies, and promotional discount guardrails.

title: Employee Training Module Builder
use_case: Create a complete training module for any role or skill — learning objectives, lesson content, practical exercises, assessment questions, and a manager facilitation guide. Works for onboarding, compliance, tool training, or skill development.

title: Explain Your Structured Data in Plain English
use_case: Paste any page's HTML and get back a plain-English translation of every JSON-LD block on the page — what each one tells Google, ChatGPT, and Perplexity about your business, what's missing, and which fixes would have the biggest impact. Built for non-developers who inherited a website and have no idea what schema is already there.

title: Explainer Video Storyboard Builder
use_case: Create a complete storyboard for a 60-90 second explainer video — scene-by-scene script, visual descriptions, motion/animation notes, voiceover timing, and music direction. Optimized for product demos, service overviews, and investor pitches.

title: Find the AI-Search Queries You Should Own But Don't
use_case: Build a content roadmap from a gap analysis: which AI-search queries match your expertise but currently cite weak sources, no source, or competitors you can credibly displace. Outputs a prioritized 90-day publishing plan with each query mapped to a content type, target schema, and the existing AlignAI prompt to execute it.

title: Freelancer & Contractor Agreement Generator
use_case: Generate a comprehensive independent contractor agreement covering scope of work, payment terms, intellectual property ownership, confidentiality, termination clauses, and liability limitations — written in plain English that both parties can actually understand.

title: Inbox Zero & Email Triage System
use_case: Design a personalized email management system — triage rules, folder structure, template responses, and time-boxing strategy. Also processes a batch of current emails to demonstrate the system in action and clear your backlog.

title: Industry Trend Briefing
use_case: Generate a concise, actionable briefing on the trends shaping your industry — what is changing, why it matters for your business specifically, and what to do about it. Designed for a monthly or quarterly read to keep your strategy current.

title: Internal Announcement Writer
use_case: Draft clear internal communications for any business situation — policy changes, new hires, org restructures, tool migrations, wins, or tough news. Handles tone calibration from celebratory to sensitive, with FAQ sections for complex changes.

title: Internal Knowledge Base Builder
use_case: Transform scattered tribal knowledge — SOPs, Slack threads, meeting notes, emails — into a structured, searchable knowledge base. Outputs organized articles with categories, tags, and cross-references that any team member can follow.

title: Inventory Demand Forecasting Assistant
use_case: Build an agentic workflow that analyzes 12 months of sales data, seasonal patterns, and supplier lead times to generate a rolling 90-day demand forecast with reorder alerts and safety stock recommendations.

title: Job Description & Posting Generator
use_case: Generate a compelling, inclusive job description with role summary, responsibilities, requirements (must-have vs. nice-to-have), compensation range framing, and a culture section — optimized for job board SEO.

title: KPI Dashboard Blueprint
use_case: Generate a complete KPI dashboard specification from your business goals — what to track, how to measure it, target ranges, and which tools to pull data from. Perfect for setting up Google Sheets, Looker Studio, or any BI tool.

title: Landing Page Copy & Structure Generator
use_case: Generate complete landing page copy — headline, subhead, hero section, benefits, social proof placement, CTA sequence, and objection handling — structured for conversion. Works for product launches, service pages, lead magnets, or event signups.

title: Lead Magnet Creator
use_case: Design and write a complete lead magnet — checklist, template, mini-guide, or toolkit — including the content itself, the opt-in page copy, and the follow-up email sequence. Covers the full funnel from attract to nurture.

title: Learning Accelerator for New Skills
use_case: Create a compressed learning plan for any business skill — from financial modeling to public speaking to a new software tool. Maps the 20% of knowledge that delivers 80% of results, with daily practice tasks and progress checkpoints.

title: Logo Concept Brief Generator
use_case: Generate a detailed creative brief for a logo design, including style direction, color psychology rationale, typography recommendations, and 5 distinct concept descriptions ready to hand to a designer or feed into an AI image tool.

title: Loyalty Program Design & Comms Builder
use_case: Design a complete customer loyalty program including tier structure, point mechanics, reward catalog, and a full communication sequence (launch email, milestone triggers, win-back flows) tailored to your average order value and customer lifecycle.

title: Market Size & Opportunity Estimator
use_case: Estimate your total addressable market (TAM), serviceable market (SAM), and obtainable market (SOM) using a bottoms-up approach. Produces investor-ready market sizing with documented assumptions and multiple estimation methods for cross-validation.

title: Media Pitch Email Sequence
use_case: Generate a 3-email pitch sequence for reaching journalists, podcasters, and bloggers — including the initial pitch, a follow-up with a different angle, and a final value-add touch. Each email is personalized to the outlet type.

title: Meeting-to-Action Transformer
use_case: Transform meeting recordings, transcripts, or notes into structured action items with owners, deadlines, decisions made, questions raised, and a follow-up email draft. Eliminates the "what did we decide?" problem.

title: Multi-Channel Campaign Brief Generator
use_case: Generate a complete visual campaign brief spanning ads, email, landing page, and social — all from a single creative direction. Outputs design specs, copy frameworks, asset dimensions, and a production checklist so your designer (or AI tool) can execute without guessing.

title: Multi-Platform Social Media Calendar
use_case: Create a 30-day social media content calendar across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and TikTok with post types, hooks, hashtags, and optimal posting times tailored to your industry.

title: Newsletter Content Planner & Writer
use_case: Plan and write a month of email newsletters — topic selection, subject lines, full content, CTAs, and send schedule. Maintains consistent voice across issues while varying content types to keep subscribers engaged.

title: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Generator
use_case: Generate a mutual or one-way NDA for business discussions, partnerships, hiring, or vendor relationships — with clear definitions of confidential information, exclusions, obligations, term, and remedies.

title: Performance Review Cycle Automation
use_case: Design an end-to-end performance review workflow: self-assessment prompts, manager evaluation templates, 360-feedback question sets, calibration discussion guides, and development plan generators — all customized to your company values and competency framework.

title: Pitch Deck Visual Direction Guide
use_case: Generate a complete visual direction document for a pitch deck — slide-by-slide layout recommendations, data visualization styles, image direction, color usage rules, and a consistent visual system that makes a 15-slide deck look like it was designed by a professional agency.

title: Podcast Episode Outline & Show Notes Generator
use_case: Generate a complete podcast episode plan — topic angle, cold open hook, segment breakdown with timestamps, interview questions (if guest episode), show notes with SEO keywords, social media clips to cut, and a newsletter recap draft. One prompt produces your entire episode production workflow.

title: Press Release Generator
use_case: Generate a complete, AP-style press release for product launches, company milestones, partnerships, or events — including headline, subheadline, dateline, body with quotes, boilerplate, and media contact block.

title: Privacy Policy Generator
use_case: Generate a GDPR and CCPA-aware privacy policy for your website or app — covering data collection, usage, sharing, cookies, user rights, and contact information. Structured by regulation requirement so nothing is missed.

title: Process Documentation Generator
use_case: Turn a verbal or rough explanation of how you do something into a clean, step-by-step SOP that anyone on your team can follow. Includes decision points, edge cases, tool-specific instructions, and a troubleshooting section.

title: Product Description Writer
use_case: Generate conversion-optimized product descriptions for e-commerce listings — including a benefit-driven headline, scannable feature bullets, emotional body copy, and SEO-friendly meta text. Works for Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, and any online store.

title: Product Mockup Prompt Generator
use_case: Generate detailed image prompts for product photography mockups — lifestyle shots, flat lays, packaging renders, and hero images optimized for e-commerce listings, social media, and marketing materials.

title: Product Photography Brief Generator
use_case: Generate a complete product photography brief for e-commerce — covering hero shots, lifestyle images, detail close-ups, scale reference shots, and platform-specific requirements. Includes AI image generation prompts for each shot type.

title: Returns & Refund Policy Generator
use_case: Generate a clear, customer-friendly returns and refund policy that protects your business while building buyer confidence — including return windows, conditions, process steps, refund timelines, and exchange options.

title: Revenue Forecasting Model Builder
use_case: Build a multi-scenario revenue forecast from your historical data — baseline, optimistic, and conservative — with monthly projections, assumption documentation, and sensitivity analysis. Output is investor-ready or usable for internal planning.

title: Review Response Template Engine
use_case: Generate professional, empathetic responses to Google/Yelp reviews — both positive and negative — that match your brand voice and include a specific call-to-action.

title: Rewrite Meta Descriptions as Answers, Not Ads
use_case: Paste a list of your existing meta descriptions and get back rewrites that read like direct answers to the question each page implicitly answers — the format AI engines and modern SERPs reward. Returns three voicings per page so you can pick the one that matches your brand.

title: SEO Content Brief Generator
use_case: Generate a structured SEO content brief for a blog post targeting a specific keyword, including title options, meta description, H2 outline, and internal linking suggestions.

title: SEO Page Optimizer
use_case: Optimize any existing page for search — analyze current content against a target keyword, rewrite weak sections, generate meta tags, suggest internal links, and create a structured data recommendation. Works on blog posts, service pages, product pages, or landing pages.

title: Short-Form Video Script & Shot List
use_case: Generate a complete 30-60 second video script with shot-by-shot breakdown, hook options, call-to-action variants, and platform-specific formatting for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

title: Social Media Caption & Content Generator
use_case: Generate a week or month of social media captions across platforms — LinkedIn, Instagram, X/Twitter, Facebook — from a single content theme or product focus. Each post is platform-optimized with hashtags, hook lines, and CTA variations.

title: Social Media Graphics Brief Generator
use_case: Generate platform-specific graphic design briefs for Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and TikTok — with exact dimensions, text placement guidelines, visual direction, and ready-to-use prompts for Canva AI or image generation tools.

title: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) Generator
use_case: Generate a complete SOP document for any repeatable business process — from employee onboarding to warehouse receiving — in a consistent, numbered-step format with role assignments and exception handling.

title: Support Ticket Triage & Response Drafter
use_case: Classify incoming support tickets by urgency and category, then draft context-aware first responses using your knowledge base and past resolution patterns as few-shot examples.

title: Survey & Feedback Insight Extractor
use_case: Turn a pile of survey responses, NPS comments, support tickets, or review feedback into a structured insights report with themes, sentiment breakdown, priority actions, and quotable highlights. Works with any unstructured text feedback.

title: SWOT-to-Strategy Action Plan
use_case: Conduct a structured SWOT analysis for your business, then use chain-of-thought reasoning to convert each finding into a prioritized 90-day action plan with owners, KPIs, and dependencies.

title: Terms of Service Generator
use_case: Generate comprehensive Terms of Service for a website, SaaS product, or e-commerce store — covering acceptable use, payment terms, refund policy, intellectual property, liability limitations, and dispute resolution.

title: Testimonial Request Email Sequence
use_case: Generate a 2-email sequence to request customer testimonials — a warm initial ask and a gentle follow-up — plus a structured questionnaire that guides customers to give specific, usable testimonials instead of generic "great product" responses.

title: Turn Any How-To Blog Post into HowTo Schema
use_case: Paste a how-to or tutorial blog post and get back a complete, paste-ready Schema.org HowTo JSON-LD block — extracted steps, tools, supplies, total time, and image references — plus a content-quality audit of any step that AI engines won't cite confidently.

title: UGC-Style Ad Script Generator
use_case: Generate authentic-sounding user-generated content ad scripts for social media — including the "real person" hook, product demo moment, objection handling, and CTA. Formatted for creators to film on their phone with zero production budget.

title: Vendor Negotiation Email Sequence
use_case: Draft a 3-email negotiation sequence for renewing a vendor contract, including an opening anchor, a concession strategy, and a walk-away alternative, all adapted to your specific contract terms.

title: Website Accessibility Audit
use_case: Audit your website or app for accessibility issues — WCAG 2.1 compliance, screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation, color contrast, form usability, and alt text. Outputs a categorized issue list with severity, fix instructions, and a remediation priority roadmap. Helps avoid lawsuits and reach more customers.

title: Weekly AI Search Health Check (10 Minutes)
use_case: A 10-minute weekly checklist prompt that scans your homepage and top 3 money pages for the four AEO regressions that quietly kill citations: schema disappearing after a deploy, robots.txt accidentally blocking AI crawlers, FAQ answers drifting from JSON-LD, and Rich Results errors appearing in Google Search Console. Run every Monday morning.

title: Weekly Planning & Prioritization System
use_case: Turn a chaotic brain dump of tasks, meetings, and deadlines into a structured weekly plan with time blocks, priority rankings, and delegation suggestions. Designed for business owners juggling too many roles.

title: Workflow Automation Mapper
use_case: Map your current manual workflows step-by-step, then identify which steps can be automated with AI or no-code tools. Outputs a prioritized automation roadmap with estimated time savings, tool recommendations, and implementation sequence.

title: Write a robots.txt That Welcomes AI Crawlers
use_case: Generate a complete robots.txt with an explicit allow-list for the major AI answer-engine crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended and more) plus a sitemap pointer. Paste-ready for any small business site.

title: Write an About Page That AI Engines Trust
use_case: Generate an About page packed with the entity signals AI answer engines use to decide whether to cite you — founder names with credentials, founding year, location, expertise areas, press mentions, and same-as references — plus matching Organization + Person JSON-LD. Returns a clear, scannable page humans love and crawlers can parse.

title: Write Your Business's Organization Schema
use_case: Generate paste-ready Organization + WebSite JSON-LD that tells Google, ChatGPT and Perplexity who your business is, where to find you, and what makes you authoritative. Includes the SearchAction block that powers the sitelinks search box in Google.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Concept Generator
use_case: Generate 5 high-click-rate thumbnail concepts for a YouTube video, including text overlay (max 4 words), facial expression direction, color blocking strategy, and AI image prompts for background generation.
